intro: AM-gated: clean L Achilles → standalone run-MHR max test below, owed since W7, named for W10 Fri (Adj #9/#53/#93/#106). Not clean → fallback progression (see cues).

flags: AM-gated session — check L Achilles before choosing path (Adj #113).
cardio.workout: Run-MHR max test: 12 min easy build, 8 min ramp 8:00→6:30/mi, 60–90s max effort flat-out (capture peak HR vs 191 lock), 8–10 min easy cooldown. Treadmill, Vomero Plus.

targets.pace: Ramp 8:00→6:30/mi stepped, then all-out max effort
targets.hr: Capture peak — target >191 (current rower-test lock); off-191 zones skew low for running (Adj #9)
targets.cadence: 178–185 spm on the ramp, uncapped on the max effort

cardio.warmup: 12 min easy build 10:30→8:30/mi, cadence building to 172–178 spm
cardio.cooldown: 8–10 min easy jog/walk, 10:30–11:30/mi, falling to Z1
cues: Fallback if AM Achilles not clean: §4.C 35 min progression — 20 min easy build (9:45→8:30/mi) + last 15 min @ M 8:30/mi; defer test again (Adj #106).
Vomero Plus regardless of path — Zoom Fly 6 stays short-tempo-only while Achilles reactive (Adj #34).
